condition: The model is a rectangular slab with only added rectangular solids attached to its underside. Four shallow underside pads sit near the perimeter, and each pad carries a narrower, deeper rectangular continuation below it, producing a two-tier underside protrusion pattern. The deeper continuation in each pair is contained within the shallow pad footprint and shares either the left or right vertical edge along with the front and back edges. Treat all of these underside features as solid added material; there are no holes, cut-throughs, recesses, or engraved top-face details.
